verses.text: Jesuh in a nungzui sawmlenihte sam a, dawite a hawlkhiat theihna ding uh leh natna nam khempeuh a damsak theihna dingun amaute tungah vangliatna a pia hi
Tua sawltak sawmlenihte' min in: A masa-in Simon (Peter zong a kicipa) leh a naupa Andru, Zebedi' tapa James leh a naupa Johan
Filip leh Bartholomew, Thomas leh siahdongpa Matthai, Alfeas' tapa James, Thaddeas
Simon (gam khualpa), leh Jesuh a lehhek Iskariot' tapa Judas ahi uh hi.
Jesuh in hih mi sawmlenihte sawl a, “Gentail mite gamsung ahi a, Samaria mite khuasungah ahi zongin lut kei un
Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite lakah va paizaw un
Na paina peuh uhah, ‘Vantung ki-ukna hong naita hi,’ ci-in thu va hilh un
Cinate damsakin, misite hingsakin, miphakte damsakin, dawite va hawlkhia un. Man piak kulloin hih vangliatna na ngah uh bangin hih vangliatna na zatna uhah zong man va ngen kei un
Kham ahi a, ngun ahi a, sumngo ahi zongin sum peuhmah na ip sung uhah keng kei un
Khualzinna-ah an ngenin puakna ding ip ahi a, khedap ahi a, ciangkhut ahi zongin keng kei un la, puanak zong a val kengthuah kei un. Nasem mite pen amau sapnateng mite in a piak ding a ngeina ahi hi

“Khuapi ahi a, khuaneu ahi zongin khua khat peuhpeuh na tun' uh ciangin tua khuasungah note zin hong tungsak nuam kua om ahi hiam, ci-in zong un la, na muh uh ciangin tuate' inn-ah tungin, tua khua na nusiat mateng uh tua lai mahah omsuak pah un
Inn khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin a mite hopihin thupha na pia un
Tua na hopihna uh innsunga mite in note hong tun'saknop leh na hopihna thupha uh amaute tungah kip ding a, ahi zongin hong tun'saknop kei uh leh na hopihna thupha uh na dokkik ding uh hi
Inn khat peuhpeuh in ahi a, khua khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin note hong tun'saknop kei a, na thugen uh hong ngaihnop kei leh tua lai panin paikhia un la, na khe uha leivui bangte sin'khiat un
Thukhen ni ciangin tua khuamite' thuakna sangin Sodom khua leh Gomorrah khuamite' thuakna olzaw lai ding ahihna thu hoihtakin phawk un. * *
“Ngiahon lakah tuu a kikhah bangin note hong sawlkhia ka hih manin gul bangin pilvang un la, vakhu bangin migi un
Mi pawlkhatte in note hong manin zumah hong paipih ding uh a, amaute' kikhopna innsungah hong satgawp ding uh ahih manin hoihtakin kidawm un
Keima hangin gam ukte leh kumpite mai-ah thu hong kisit ding hi. Hih bang na tuah uh ciangin thu hong sit mite leh Gentail mite tungah Lungdamna Thu gentheihna ding hunhoih a nei na hi uh hi
Tua bangin thusitna a thuak dingin hong kipaipih ciangin, bang gen ding ihi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un. A hun a tun' ciangin na gending teng uh hong kihilh ding hi
Thu na gen uh ciangin note' gen hiloin, na Pa uh' Kha Siangtho in note tung tawnin thu a gen ding ahi hi
Unau leh unau, pa in a ta, tate in a nu a pate langpangin sihna a thuak dingin khatlekhat kiheek ding uh hi
Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawpdongin a thuakzo mite in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi
Khua khatah note hong kibawlsiat leh khuadang khatah tai un. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Israel khua khempeuh na khit ma-un Mihing Tapa hong pai ding hi
“A siapa sangin a sang naupangte lianzaw ngeilo a, a topa sangin a silate lianzaw ngeilo hi

Tua ahih manin sang naupangte pen a siapa uh tawh a kibat uh leh a lungkim ding uh hi a, silate pen a tote uh tawh a kibat uh leh a lungkim ding uh ahi hi. Innteek lutangpa pen Beelzebul hong ci uh ahih leh a innkuanpih mite tua sangin min siazaw tawh hong kozaw lai ding uh hilo ahi hiam?
“Tua ahih manin kuamah kihta kei un. A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu ding a, thusimte khatvei teitei thulang suak ding hi
Zan khuamial sunga kong gente, sun khuavak sungah taangko un la, a simthamin kong huau thute, innkhumdawn zangah na taangko un
Pumpi a thah khit ciangin kha a that theilote na kihta kei un. Hell khuk sungah pumpi leh kha a nihin a susia theipa na kihtazaw un
Gitta nih ciangin mat khatin kizuak lel hilo ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in na Pa uh' thukim lohin tua gittate khat nangawn lei-ah mawkkiatlo hi
Note ahih leh na lu tung uha na sammal phazah nangawn uh hong kiciamtehsak hi
Tua ahih manin lau kei un. Gitta tampi sangin note na manphazaw uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Khrih' Mi Hi'ng, ci-in Mi' Theih-a Genna

verses.text: “Keima mi ahihna thu mite' theihin a genkhia mite, kei zong vantungah ka Pa' mai-ah keima mi ahihna thu ka gen ding hi
Ahi zongin keima mi ahihna thu mite' theihin a genkhia nuamlote, kei zong vantungah ka Pa' mai-ah keima mi ahihna thu ka genkhia nuam kei ding hi.
“Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin hong pai hi, ci-in hong ngaihsun kei un. Kilemna a omsak dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, kidona ding namsau a khah dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi
Tate leh pate a kidosak ding, tanute leh nute a kidosak ding, monute leh teeknute a kidosak dingin a hong pai ka hi hi
Mi khat-a' dingin a gal lianpenpen ama innkuanpih mite mah hong hi ding hi
“Kei sangin a nu a pa a itzawte kei tawh kilawmlo a, kei sangin a tapa a tanu a itzawte kei tawh kilawmlo hi
Ama singlamteh mah puatawm lopi-in ka nung hong zuite kei tawh kilawmlo hi
Hih leitung nuntakna a hon nuamte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh ding a, keima hangin a nuntakna a taanlawhte in a nuntakna taktak a ngah ding uh hi.
“Na thugen uh a hong sangte in kei' thu a hong sang hi a, kei a hong sangte in kei a hong sawlpa zong a sang ahi uh hi
Pasian' thugen ahihna hangin Pasian' thugen mi a sangte in Pasian' thugente' thaman ngah ding a, mihoih hihna hangin mihoih a sang mite in mihoihte' thaman ngah ding uh hi
Keima nungzui mi a neupen khat nangawn, keima nungzui ahihna hangin tuivot hai khat bek a suahte nangawn in pelloin thaman a ngah ding lamtak phawk un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi.
